title: Primalmon
body:
# **PRIMALMON!**

HEY! welcome to my mini datapack/resourcepack combo! this pack requires cobblemon, won't work without it!

what's added atm are two new evolutions for eevee, one called Griffeon!
The other is a normal type evolution called Lusheon!

![Griffeon!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5SSpVPw4/images/0c35523aecbcab52e1914d037c33a282a1f46a46.png)
```
Griffeon
Type: Flying
Pokedex Entry: Griffeon is a friendly and playful Pokémon, with a cute yet majestic apperance. 
it enjoys soaring through the sky with it's trainer or partner making heart-shaped movements.
Evolution Method: Give Eevee an Oval Stone to make it evolve into Griffeon
Stats: ***STATS LIKELY TO CHANGE***
  HP: 80
  ATK: 110
  DEF: 70
  SP. ATK: 85
  SP. DEF: 80
  SPD: 130
```

![Lusheon!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5SSpVPw4/images/8b5e963465e5a6630e8daf919336b24079770225.png)
```
Lusheon
Type: Normal
Pokedex Entry: Lusheon is a curious creature, that lives in wooded areas and is known for it's social behavior. 
Its fur color constantly changes to help it blend into it's surroundings.
Evolution Method: Reach level 25 to evolve into Lusheon
Stats: ***STATS LIKELY TO CHANGE***
  HP: 80
  ATK: 80
  DEF: 80
  SP. ATK: 110
  SP. DEF: 95
  SPD: 115
```


**Special Thanx:**
**Nub/Raisen - Helped Remodel and texture griffeon so he didn't look like a childs school project**
**RJ Palmer - For permission to use his griffeon's likeness RJ-PALMER.com**
